<user_query>
Locate where the website 'How it all works' diagram/section is implemented in this repo. Identify exact file paths, key components, and any related styling files. Also capture the current content blocks and labels used in the diagram. Return concise bullets with paths and relevant snippets.
</user_query>
Searching the repo for the "How it all works" section and related diagram implementation.
Reading `IntelligenceDiagram` ‚Äî it renders the diagram below the heading.

Here is a concise report for the parent agent. --- ## Where it lives - **Page shell (heading + intro copy + diagram mount)** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\HomePage.js` - Section `data-testid="how-it-all-works"` contains the **H2** ‚ÄúHow it all works‚Äù and the paragraph under it; the diagram is the next sibling via ``. ```141:158:C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\pages\website\HomePage.js {/* How it all works block under hero */}

How it all works

BIQc pulls live signal from every system, runs continuous watchtower checks, and turns complexity into clear boardroom actions.

``` - **Diagram implementation** `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hrx\frontend\src\components\website\IntelligenceDiagram.js` - Exported as `IntelligenceDiagram`; root `data-testid="intelligence-diagram"`. - **Related imports on the page** - `IntelligenceDiagram` from `../../components/website/IntelligenceDiagram` - `fontFamily` from `../../design-system/tokens` --- ## Styling - **No dedicated stylesheet** for this section: **Tailwind** utility classes plus **inline `style={{ ... }}`** and **embedded `
